{{Infobox artifact
| name = Vasha
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

''See also: [[Vasha Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Vasha is a [[Dragon's Fang]], a specialized [[sword]] that can be summoned to the wielder's hand. Unlike other weapons of its kind, such as [[Azura]] or [[Mithra]], Vasha is a more practical length at approximately five feet from the tip of its blade to the end of the pommel. Its physical appearance is distinct; rather than gleaming, the [[steel]] is dull and pitted with a chipped blade that looks as though it has been struck against a mountain. Despite this worn appearance, the metal is now virtually indestructible and cannot be scratched. Vasha is an artifact originating from Ragnarus, the [[Crimson Vault]], having been taken from a fallen enemy during combat. The weapon is capable of slicing through bone and [[steel]] with ease, and it can be used to deflect magical attacks like fireballs. Beyond its physical utility, Vasha possesses a sentient quality, manifesting as a distant mind to its user that can eventually be sensed as a full personality. While it is typically summoned by its owner, the blade can also be lost or rendered unreachable if it is cast away.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Vasha]] is a [[Dragon's Fang]] [[sword]] that is approximately five feet long from pommel to tip.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Vasha]]'s surface is dull, pitted, and its blade is chipped.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[steel]] of [[Vasha]] is now all but indestructible.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Vasha first flashed against the [[Incarnation]]'s bar of dark ice before being summoned by [[Indirial]]. This weapon, which shimmers like an illusion and causes phantom chains to crawl across a user's flesh, fell from the numb hands of [[Zakareth]]. As a blade capable of biting through ordinary [[steel]], Vasha was later noted as missing from the entry hall while [[Indirial]] performed a count of six. Ultimately, Vasha returned to [[Indirial]]'s side and utilized its cracked blade during combat against [[Kai]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Vasha]] flashed against the [[Incarnation]]'s bar of dark ice.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3">''City of Light'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial]] summoned [[Vasha]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Vasha]] possesses a cracked blade.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Vasha]] is a weapon that shimmers like an illusion and has phantom chains crawling across the user's flesh.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Vasha]] fell from [[Zakareth]]'s numb hands.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Vasha]] is something [[Indirial]] can summon.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Vasha]] is a blade summoned by [[Indirial]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20">''City of Light'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Vasha]] is a weapon used by [[Indirial]] that can bite through ordinary [[steel]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Vasha]] is missing from the entry hall.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Vasha]] is one of the six people/things [[Indirial]] is counting.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial]] has [[Vasha]] at his side.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Vasha]] possesses a cracked blade used in combat against [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
